entry.title: SAPUI5 - Controller function not call after change the view setting of macros table
entry.content:
I have create a fragment.xml file to config my macros table like this:

<core:FragmentDefinition
xmlns="sap.m"
xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros"
xmlns:macrosTable="sap.fe.macros.table"
>
<Dialog title="Dialog" id="idDialog">
<macros:FilterBar
metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields"
id="FilterBar"
liveMode="true"
/>
<macros:Table
id="DialogTable"
metaPath="changes/@UI.PresentationVariant#Dialog"
personalization="true"
readOnly="true"
isSearchable="true"
enableExport="true"
disableCopyToClipboard="true"
enableAutoColumnWidth="true"
headerVisible="false"
filterBar="FilterBar"
ignoredFields="up__ID"
>
<macros:columns>
<macrosTable:Column
header="Link"
id="link"
importance="High"
width="auto"
horizontalAlign="Begin"
key="link_id"
>
<Link
text="Currency"
press="onLinkPress"
/>
</macrosTable:Column>
</macros:columns>
</macros:Table>

</Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>


The function onLinkPress is define in a controller which load this fragment. It still call onLinkPress success when open, reset or search in the dialog
 
But when I try to remove this link column from the dialog using column setting in personalization dialog and then add it again, the link not working, it not call the controller function

entry.title: SAPUI5 & OData: Multiple service calls vs single service call with multiple entities
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to create a SAPUI5 application that will display data from multiple mainly non-related tables using OData V2. We'll be using VSCode to create the UI5 application.

Is it better to:

a) create a separate OData service for each table and have multiple datasources in the manifest.json

or

b) one OData service containing multiple entities (each entity would relate to an individual DB table) ?

If the answer is b) then how do we structure the OData service and related manifest.json to retrieve all the required data from the one OData service?

All help greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Validation Rules for Products: Default radio button is missing in manage views popover
entry.content:
The app "Validation Rules for Products", ID F4083, component CA-MDG-ADQ, does not have a default view in "My Views."  Within the "Manage Views" dialog there is not an option to select a default view. SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Master Data Governance 

Most other apps have a default radio button. 

Is there a way to add the default button to this app so that business users can have consistency across apps?

entry.title: Vue UI5 webcomponents binding
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am starting with UI5 webcomponents. I choosed VUE framework.

Now t want to bind my model to a tree.

I recycled the example for binding from https://github.com/SAP-samples/ui5-webcomponents-data-binding-example

Instead a table I want to bin da treeitem.

The items are dispalyed, but the "name" is not replaced.


Any idea?
Jens

 

<ui5-tree v-for="product in supermarket.products">

                <ui5-tree-item expanded text="{{ product.name }}" icon="paste" selected> </ui5-tree-item>

</ui5-tree>

entry.title: Some transactions in not assigned cost center
entry.content: There are transactions that are Not Assigned to a cost center, but I can't find them on transaction KSB1. Is there other ways to find those transactions on the system?

entry.title: An error occurred while operating a TECO production order using T-Code CO02 or COHV
entry.content:
Subject: [SAP System] Error Report - [Short Dump ID] Dear SAP Support, I am experiencing an issue in our SAP system that I have been unable to resolve. Below is the information requested for your assistance:

1. **Short Dump Description:** - [The production order status cannot be reversed due to the change of the factory in the middle of the sales demand transmission]

 

2. **System Log:** - [Attach the saved system log file here]

3. **Source Code:** - [* step 6: Umsetzung in externes Format
  PERFORM com2_convert_instances_int_ext
   USING l_ibinwa_tab l_instance_tab2.

* step 5: read the structure
  LOOP AT l_instance_tab2 ASSIGNING <rec>.
    MOVE <rec>-instance TO l_instno_rec-instance.
    REFRESH l_instno_tab.
    INSERT l_instno_rec INTO TABLE l_instno_tab.

    create object lr_container.
    call method c_wa-r_engine->struc->read_level
      exporting
        i_ibase        = <rec>-com-ibase
                i_valfr        = l_sel_rec-p_valfr
                i_valto        = l_sel_rec-p_valto
                i_sort         = ibxx_false
                i_par          = l_par
                i_instance_tab = l_instno_tab
        ir_container   = lr_container.

    read table lr_container->gt_ibst into ls_ibst index 1.
    if sy-subrc is initial and ls_ibst-ibst-instance = <rec>-instance.
      read table lr_container->gth_ibstref into ls_ibstref with table key ibstref-st_recno = ls_ibst-ibst-st_recno.
      if sy-subrc is not initial. clear ls_ibstref. endif.
      perform com2_add_structure_data_det using <rec> ls_ibst ls_ibstref.
    ELSE.
      MESSAGE x096(iq).
    ENDIF. ]

4. **Error Conditions:**

- The error occurred under the following conditions: - [The sales demand transfer factory was changed from A to B]

- The error was caused by the following actions and inputs: - [An error occurred while operating a TECO production order using T-Code CO02 or COHV]

Please let me know if you need any additional information. Best regards, [wu]

entry.title: What is the SAP recommended user input to use for large number of entries?
entry.content:
We are currently implementing a cap application with the flexible programming model. In the background we a huge number of importers which need to be selected by the user. 

I have read into the guidelines from SAP and found out that the SELECT input field should be used for up to 12 entries, the COMBOBOX for up to 200 entries and for larger numbers of entries one should use an input with suggestions. 

Since we have more than 50000 entries I decided to use an input field with suggestions and I am filtering the results by myself. This worked fine so far, however the bad thing about the input field is that the user does not have to necessarly select an item since the input field does also accept free text. 

Therefore I looked again in the documentation and found the flag valueHelpOnly. However this flag is deprecated without any replacement and does not work in code. In the documentation it says that one should use combobox or select which goes against the guidelines which I listed above. 

Therefore I wanted to know what the recommendation from SAP side is for a select of a huge number of data, where the user should not be able to leave free text? Or if this needs to be implemented by each developer himself

entry.title: How to attach FE OP Controller Extension function to OData V4 dataReceived event?
entry.content:
I want to catch the dataReceived event of OData V4 model which is used by a Fiori Elements Standard Object Page in a Controller Extension. So that after every time the data is loaded or refreshed on the screen, I get into my custom Controller Extension function.

At onAfterRendering the data is not yet available.
So I have to attach an event to the model.

When I tried this

 

onAfterRendering: function () {
  var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();
  oModel.attachEvent('dataReceived', myFunction);
},

 

I saw that only events messageChange and sessionTimeout are available in the model.

So maybe they are available after the ExtensionAPIPromise, but it the function is not called.

 

onInit: function () {
  var oView = this.getView();
  ExtensionAPI.getExtensionAPIPromise(oView).then(
    function (oExtensionAPI) {
      oExtensionAPI.attachPageDataLoaded(function (event) {
        var sPath = event.context.sPath;  // get the path
        var oData = event.context.getModel().getProperty(sPath); 
      }.bind(this));
    }.bind(this)
  )
},

 

I also tried this. but the event is not triggered. Probably because it creates a new binding.

onAfterRendering: function () {
  var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();
  var oContextBinding = oModel.bindContext("/Run");
  oContextBinding.attachEvent('dataReceived', function (event) { 
    console.log('Testing...')
  })
},

Could you help me?

entry.title: My ControllerExtension calls Standard Worklist Controller method works...but with issues
entry.content:
This is for SAPUI5 adaptation project on ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.pr.prcss.s1.  

I created a ControllerExtension js which overrides CreateButtonsEnableCheck method in the standard Worklist.controller.js.  My intention is to add custom logic while keeping everything in the standard CreateButtonsEnableCheck intact.  In this case, I just wanted to add messagebox.alert message before calling the standard CreateButtonsEnableCheck in the Worklist.controller.js.  

Everything seems to be working.  I was able to see that the messagebox alert gets triggered before calling the standard CreateButtonsEnableCheck in Worklist.controller.js.  HOWEVER, now getSelectedContexts() within the standard CreateButtonsEnableCheck doesn't work anymore.

I'm guessing this is because of how I'm calling the standard CreateButtonsEnableCheck from the override section of my ControllerExtension js:

override: {
CreateButtonsEnableCheck: function(e, i) {
 MessageBox.alert("Button Clicked...");
 ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.pr.prcss.s1.controller.Worklist.prototype.CreateButtonsEnableCheck.apply(this, arguments);
}
}
 
From debugger (fully standard):
notice the function location is controller and it does fine getSelectedContext() successfully.

From Debugger (using my controllerextension):

notice functional location is different which causes it not to find getSelectedContext():

 Do you have any idea on how to fix this?

Thanks

entry.title: One or more parameters could not be found. - sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters
We are in 1.120.1 SAP UI-5 version. is this issue fixed in any later versions?
parameter 'args' is not of type array UI5 issue
UI5 WebComponents Binding Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I followed the great example of Nico Schönteich at https://github.com/SAP-samples/ui5-webcomponents-data-binding-example?tab=readme-ov-file to bind UI5 Webcompoents to a JSON Model.

This is working for simple tables or list.

I want to bind a Tree, where each item can have 0...n childs.
This is done in SAPUI5 with an treeitem template. How can I adchive this in UI5 WebComponents?

 

Jens

entry.title: What BusinessObjects BI Platform SDK is compatible with Crystal Reports Server 2016 SP9 Patch 15?
entry.content: I'm looking to download a BI Platform package compatible with Crystal Reports Server 2016 SP09 Patch 15 Version 14.2.9.4617, but I'm havnig a real hard time finding one.

entry.title: How to implement the usage tracking using SAP IT plugin in fiori
entry.content:
I am trying to enable some usage tracking and importing in the SAP IT library but I think I am not doing it correctly 

Log-dbg.js:497  2025-02-17 13:44:42.213699 [FUTURE FATAL] Failed to load component for container container - ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sample-project/Component.js'
-> 'sapit/util/UsageTracking.js': failed to load 'sapit/util/UsageTracking.js' from resources/sapit/util/UsageTracking.js: script load error  
ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sample-project/Component.js'
-> 'sapit/util/UsageTracking.js': failed to load 'sapit/util/UsageTracking.js' from resources/sapit/util/UsageTracking.js: script load error

 

using the following as a guide: SAP IT Usage Reporting | SAP IT Cloud

Here is my code

entry.title: Behavior of Smart Multi Input paste value from excel
entry.content:
Dear SAPUI5 expert, 

I recalled we could paste value from excel into Smart Multi Input with value help. However recently I checked this functionality was not supported for Smart Multi Input with Value Help. 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartmultiinput.SmartMultiInput/sample/sap.ui.comp.sample.smartmultiinput.withoutBinding/code

Sample Data: 

Copy below values and paste in Category with Value Help from Annotations, only last value was pasted.

CAT1
CAT2
CAT3

Copy below values and paste in Category Product Value, all values was pasted. 

700001
700002
700003

Questions: Why Smart Multi Input with value help does not support paste multiple values from excel?

Regards,

Ben

SAPUI5

entry.title: Is this a bug in the UI5 Element sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton ?
entry.content:
i am using the sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton and when the user is pressing the button the barcodescanner will open as it is supposed to be. if the user press the back button of the browser / the phone the view navigates to the view before. in the browser this is ok but on the phone the user feels it would be normal to close the barcodescanner with the backbutton of the phone and  it should stay on the view where the button is. But even worse: when i navigate again to the view with the button and press it, the barcodescanner is not opening anymore and this error apperas in the console:
BarcodeScanner.scan: Barcode scanning is already in progress. -

i tried several workarounds but nothing is working. i tried to deactivate the backbutton while the barcodescanner is open, but thats not working in modern browsers anymore. My best attempt was to close the barcodescanner before leaving the view, so it could at least open again, when trying again, but i could not successfully close it. i tried with document.getElementsByClassName('closeButton')[0].click() but it was not working.

any idea?

entry.title: Change Display of Quantity Fields in specific language SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the display of quantity fields in SAP Build Workzone for a specific language. For example, when you want to display a value of PC they will be displayed with decimal places like "1,000 PC" for one PC is available in Stock. In English language it will displayed "1 PC" without any decimal places. We also want the same display in every language.

Best regards,

Nico

entry.title: Problematic "Unnamed Object" in Fiori Elements app powered by RAP endpoint
entry.content:
Hello dear colleagues,

I have a scenario where I expose data from a table using RAP. Some fields that are part of the table key can be empty. For such fields, they look good on the OData V4 provided, they come empty as expected.

The problem is: we created a Fiori Elements app on top of this OData service, and when we look at the resulting table, all fields that should be displayed empty have the text "Unnamed Object" on them. This happens in multiple fields in multiple rows.

The columns in red are all part of the table key (and they are allowed to be empty), while the column in green is not part of the table key. So only the columns used in the table key display the unwanted "Unnamed Object" text when empty.

If you have any ideas or insights, it will be more than appreciated.

Thanks a lot!
Kind regards.

entry.title: Fiori Element - Fragment - Uncaught TypeError
entry.content:
Hi,
I have an oData V4 Service and I'm working with Fiori Elements. Into the App I want to insert an "Custom Section" (Fragment).

I have written the following coding. If the method _pf is called the program gets an Uncaught type error.

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
    'use strict';

    return {
        onPress: function(oEvent) {
            MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");
            this._pf();
        },
        _pf: function(){
            MessageToast.show("Message2");
        }

    };
});

Does anybody have an idea what the problem is?
